name: SCC_SetTLSEnabled
title: SCC_SetTLSEnabled
description: Specifies if TLS is used. As native TLS is not supported, this only affects the Security flag in the SECC Discovery Request message. By calling this function, the configuration parameter <UseTLS> is overwritten.

parameters.name: Enabled
parameters.description: 1 to enable TLS support, 0 to disable TLS support
